pattern: Research → design doc → implement. Produced design doc with data mapping, component specs, acceptance criteria before code
why: Planner had exact file paths, prop shapes, data flow. Zero ambiguity in specs. All 7 specs passed first attempt

pattern: Checked Figma exports + wiki scope before design doc. Cross-referenced Linear ticket with wiki requirements and design tokens
why: Ensured implementation matched stakeholder expectations. Caught volume pricing data gap early

pattern: Post-audit as separate phase. Parallel auditors then phased fixes (safety → performance → quality)
why: Parallel auditors gave full picture before changes. Phased execution kept each commit focused. Duration dropped 52s → 36s

pattern: Glob-based test routing replacing hardcoded file array
why: Eliminated maintenance burden. New test files auto-route to correct tier. Fixed 4 misrouted component tests

pattern: Research SDK/API capabilities before planning. Discovered customerType already supported in CMS GraphQL
why: Saved full SDK development cycle. Implementation was 4 small specs instead of cross-repo effort

pattern: Per-spec orchestration with full review pipeline (implement → spec review → 5 parallel stage 2 auditors)
why: Caught test file placement issue before merge. All specs passed first attempt — no rewrites needed

pattern: API contract doc for future enhancements. Documented what Geins API needs to add + sales-portal readiness
why: Future wiring is ~5 lines per variable. Nothing forgotten — M7 backlog items tracked

pattern: Single source of truth pattern: ResolvedLocaleMarket interface flowing validated data through entire pipeline. Pure function + event context
why: Eliminated 13 architectural problems in one refactor. 4 specs, all passed first attempt. Foundation/consumers/client/docs split kept specs focused

pattern: Layered validation: plugin 00 parses (no validation), plugin 01 validates (with tenant config), consumers just read. Each layer has one job
why: No more redundant URL parsing in 5+ places. Cache key bug fixed by reading validated context instead of raw cookies
